title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 67.2680 - Satellite or streaming video services, no new tax, license, or fee
text:
67.2680.  Satellite or streaming video services, no new tax, license, or fee. — The state or any other political subdivision shall not impose any new tax, license, or fee in addition to any tax, license, or fee already authorized on or before August 28, 2021, upon the provision of satellite or streaming video service.
(L. 2021 H.B. 271 merged with S.B. 153 & 97)
